news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
Simplify Launches Two ETFs Focused on Capturing Opportunities Found in Companies With High Levels of “Intangible Capital”

holdings.infoBox: NXTI is an equity ETF with a total of 201 individual holdings. The top holdings are Walmart stock at 4.95%, Cisco Systems at 4.92%, Palantir Technologies at 3.90%, Johnson & Johnson at 3.76%, and Dell Technologies at 3.30%.

overview.description: The Simplify Next Intangible Core Index ETF (NXTI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Next Intangible Core index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 200 US companies that exhibit high intangible capital-to-book assets ratios within their respective sector. The fund seeks to outperform traditional market-cap indexes. NXTI was launched on Apr 15, 2024 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify announced today that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across six Simplify ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Launches Two ETFs Focused on Capturing Opportunities Found in Companies With High Levels of “Intangible Capital”
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches Intangible Core and Value ETFs, tracking indexes backed by academic research emphasizing the importance of intangible capital.
